game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Die drei ??? – Ruf der Trolle:** Players navigate various locations in Rocky Beach by tapping on interactive hotspots to move, examine objects, and initiate dialogue with NPCs. The core gameplay loop involves collecting clues, combining inventory items, and solving narrative-driven logical puzzles, such as deciphering coded messages or reconstructing events from witness testimonies. Progression is linear, with the successful resolution of each puzzle or completion of a dialogue tree unlocking new scenes, character interactions, or advancing the overarching "troll" mystery storyline. Difficulty scales through the increasing complexity of multi-step puzzles and the subtlety of required deductions, while the user interface features a persistent inventory bar and contextual action icons for interactions. The game concludes upon solving the central mystery, with no explicit failure states beyond being stuck on a puzzle, and new locations become accessible only after specific story triggers are met.
game_info.description: You are one of "Die drei ???" (The Three Investigators) solving the mysterious "Call of the Trolls" case in Rocky Beach. Navigate through different locations, examine objects, talk to witnesses, and collect clues. Solve logical puzzles by combining evidence and deducing the truth. Your goal is to uncover who is behind the troll-themed threats and why. Progress through the story by solving puzzles that unlock new locations and advance the mystery.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and menu options
Space: Interact with highlighted hotspot/object, advance dialogue, confirm actions
Z: Open/close inventory, combine selected items
Shift: Examine selected inventory item for details
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic navigation and interaction mechanics. Validates that the player can move between locations, interact with hotspots, and collect items.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all accessible locations systematically. Interact with all visible hotspots and objects. Collect any items that become available through basic interactions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully visits multiple locations, collects at least 2-3 clues or items, and confirms that navigation and interaction systems work correctly. No crashes or stuck states.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete game flow from start to finish. Implements optimal puzzle-solving strategy to reach the win condition by solving all puzzles in the correct sequence.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the optimal solution path: collect initial clues, solve the coded message puzzle, interview all witnesses in the correct order, combine evidence items, deduce the culprit's identity, and confront them with proof.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by successfully solving all puzzles and identifying the perpetrator. Validates that all story triggers work correctly and the win condition is achievable.
